steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content:
Left of blank: A singular noun phrase serves as the subject of the clause (“MindMaze's technology, alongside other such neuromodulation technologies that function by stimulating nervous system structures”).
Right of blank: A noun phrase object (“the way for future advancements in neurotechnology”).

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
The rule is subject-verb agreement: the verb must match its subject in number. “Is paving” (choice B) is singular and matches the singular subject.

Choices C and D use plural verbs (have, are) that violate agreement, and choice A omits the auxiliary.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
